content:
TypeScript 7 is now out!, apparently a 10x faster native port of TypeScript...

🚀 Much faster builds and type checking (typically 8–12x faster), reducing waiting time for test runs and CI pipelines.

⚡ Faster feedback on coding errors, helping defects get caught earlier before reaching testing environments.

🧪 Quicker execution of TypeScript-based automation projects such as Playwright test suites.

💻 More responsive IDE experience with faster autocomplete, diagnostics, and code navigation.

📉 Lower memory usage, improving performance on large applications and monorepos.

✅ More stable tooling, with significantly fewer language server failures and crashes.

🚄 Faster CI/CD pipelines, enabling quicker releases and shorter feedback cycles.

Bottom line: TypeScript 7 helps testing teams deliver faster by reducing build times, speeding up test automation workflows, and improving developer productivity.

Happy exploring peeps!
